title: Blepharoglossum fissilabrum

intro: Blepharoglossum fissilabrum, commonly known as Fissilabrum or Blepharoglossum, is a type of flowering plant in the Blepharoglossum genus, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its purported health benefits.
